news.headline: UFG declares $0.16 quarterly dividend per share, payable on March 21, 2025 to shareholders of record by March 7, 2025.

news.headline: Marten Transport (Nasdaq: MRTN) declares $0.06 quarterly dividend, payable on March 28 to shareholders on record as of March 14.
news.summary: Mondovi, Wisconsin- On February 21, 2025, Marten Transport, Ltd. (Nasdaq/GS:MRTN) revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.06 per common stock share. This dividend is scheduled to be distributed on March 28, 2025, to stockholders listed on record as of the market close on March 14, 2025.

news.headline: Dollarama (TSX: DOL) to announce Q4 & fiscal year 2025 results on April 3, 2025; Call at 7:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Montreal-based Dollarama Inc. (TSX: DOL) has announced that it will disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluding on February 2, 2025, on April 3, 2025, at 7:00 a.m. (ET). Alongside this release, management will conduct a conference call to analyze the results on the same day. Investors and analysts are invited to participate in this discussion to gain insights into the company's financial standing for that period.

news.headline: Co-Diagnostics plans to submit an improved COVID-19 test for FDA approval after withdrawing due to shelf-life stability concerns.
news.summary: The Company announced on Feb. 21, 2025, that it is retracting its current submission due to FDA guidance regarding the shelf-life stability of a critical test component. Co-Diagnostics, Inc. (Nasdaq-CM: CODX), a molecular diagnostics firm, is taking this action.

news.headline: ZachXBT attributes $1.4B Bybit hack to Lazarus Group, rewarded with Arkham bounty. X community offers support and security tips for affected users.
news.summary: Following a security breach on the Bybit exchange resulting in a loss exceeding $1.4 billion, members of the cryptocurrency community on platform X rallied to provide assistance and offer guidance on enhancing security measures for users affected by the incident.

news.headline: Expedia Group closed $1 billion Senior Notes Offering of 5.400% due 2035 at 99.316% price with $994 million net proceeds.
news.summary: Expedia Group, Inc. revealed the successful completion of its Senior Notes Offering where $1 billion worth of unsecured 5.400% Senior Notes due 2035 were issued. The Senior Notes, guaranteed by select subsidiaries of Expedia Group, were sold at 99.316% of their principal amount, carrying a 5.400% coupon. This move aims to generate net proceeds for the company.

news.headline: KB Home offers new townhome-style condo in prime San Francisco East Bay location in Castro Valley, California.
news.summary: A rare chance to purchase a new townhome-style condo in a prime East Bay location in San Francisco has been announced by KB Home, a company known for its strong emphasis on relationships. The townhome offers a unique living experience in Castro Valley, California.

news.headline: MP Materials on track to make auto-grade magnets for GM; received price-target boosts after Q4 results.
news.summary: After reporting strong Q4 results, MP Materials received two price-target increases. The company is set to produce automotive-grade magnets for GM. This development has propelled MP Materials to its buy point, indicating a positive trajectory as its vision materializes.

news.summary: On Friday, PDD Holdings ADR experienced a rise in its IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating, moving from 94 to 97. This increase signifies a positive trend in the company's performance as reflected in its updated rating.

news.headline: Tesla stock is down while BYD rises on self-driving initiatives. Tesla to deliver Model Y in China, BYD surges.
news.summary: Deliveries of the new Model Y by Tesla in China are set to commence this month. Meanwhile, the EV company BYD has experienced a significant increase, reaching new highs due to its focus on self-driving technology. The stock of Tesla, TSLA, has continued its decline while BYD has soared due to its advancements in autonomous driving.

news.headline: TALON PV and TRINA Solar sign multi-GW supply deal for TOPCon solar cells from 2026. Leading innovation in photovoltaic tech.
news.summary: In Houston on February 21, 2025, TALON PV, a top player in advanced photovoltaic technology, revealed an important partnership with TRINA Solar, a prominent solar module manufacturer. The deal involves a strategic agreement for a multi-gigawatt (GW) supply on a long-term basis. This collaboration signifies a significant step forward for both companies in the solar energy sector.

news.headline: The US will establish new rules to curb the exploitation of its capital, technology, and knowledge by foreign adversaries like China - White House Official.
Bitcoin makes a comeback as numbers indicate potential rally to $100K+.
news.summary: According to recent reports, a record-breaking number of 3.2 million new unemployment claims were filed last week in the United States. This significant surge brings the total number of jobless claims to over 33 million in the past seven weeks, highlighting the severe economic impact of the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic. The unprecedented levels of unemployment have raised concerns about the long-term effects on the labor market and overall economy. The government is facing increasing pressure to implement measures to support those who have lost their jobs and stabilize the economy during this challenging time.

news.headline: Teck Resources profits surge to $385 million, driven by record copper production - shrugs off tariff risks.
news.summary: Teck Resources, a Canadian mining company listed on the NYSE as TECK, is confident about its business despite potential U.S. tariffs. CEO Jonathan Price mentioned during the recent earnings call that their exports are mainly directed towards Asia and Europe. If tariffs are imposed, Price believes trade flows will adjust accordingly, citing the company's resilient business model due to product and operation diversification. The company reported a significant increase in earnings, with a profit of $385 million (equivalent to 75 cents per share) compared to a loss of $167 million in the previous year. Adjusted earnings also rose from four cents to 45 cents per share. Revenue surged to $2.8 billion, supported by record copper production at the Quebrada Blanca site in Chile. Copper production for the quarter rose to 122,000 tons, up from 103,000 tons in the previous year, while zinc production decreased to 146,000 tons from 182,000 tons. Teck's management continues to prioritize copper growth, as highlighted by their recent sale completion. For more details, the full article is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Fortrea adding Erin L. Russell to board of directors following agreement with Starboard for cooperation.
news.summary: Fortrea and Starboard have recently entered into a Cooperation Agreement. This deal involves a partnership between the two companies to work together strategically. The agreement entails sharing resources, knowledge, and expertise for mutual benefit. The collaboration aims to enhance their market positions and drive growth. Both companies will be combining their efforts to achieve this goal. The deal reflects a significant move in the industry, with Fortrea and Starboard joining forces to leverage their strengths. This cooperation agreement is anticipated to have a positive impact on both companies' performance and reach. This collaboration is expected to play a key role in their future endeavors.

PACU Day event hosted by Piedmont Advantage CU in Winston-Salem highlights science of play and purpose in life.
news.summary: In Winston-Salem, North Carolina on February 21, 2025, Piedmont Advantage Credit Union hosted its annual PACU Day event on President's Day. This event brings together credit union employees for a day focused on professional development and receiving direct updates from leadership regarding the credit union's current status.

news.headline: Nokia Corp bought back shares on 2/21/2025.
SRIVARU Holding faces legal claim from Sabby Volatility Warrant Master Fund in NY court. Company vows to defend shareholder value.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, SRIVARU Holding Limited (OTC: SVUHF) received notice of a legal claim filed by Sabby Volatility Warrant Master Fund Ltd. in the Supreme Court of the State of New York (Index No. 650870/2025). SRIVARU aims to uphold transparency, adhere to regulatory standards, and safeguard shareholder interests as it addresses the allegations in the lawsuit.

news.headline: Tevogen Bio holds strong market cap growth at 600%, with 79% insider-owned shares. They aim for innovation and cost-effectiveness in the biotech industry.
news.summary: In Warren, New Jersey, on February 21, 2025, Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: TVGN) announced its goal to establish new efficiency benchmarks in the biotech sector. The company, a clinical-stage specialty immunotherapy firm, aspires to demonstrate that innovation and affordability can harmonize. Tevogen Bio's strategy, crafted in response to the escalating expenses of drug research, supports ongoing drug price restructuring initiatives. Moreover, it defies conventional biotech funding practices to guarantee enduring viability.

news.headline: White House Official: Trump to sign national security memorandum aimed at promoting foreign investment while protecting us national security interests from threats posed by foreign adversaries like China.
Congress set to hold crucial hearings on crypto, including CBDCs, stablecoins, and market legislation.
news.summary: Congress will be conducting hearings in both chambers to discuss central bank digital currencies (CBDCs), stablecoins, and legislation related to market structure. This legislative process will involve deliberations on key issues affecting the financial sector, including the potential implementation of CBDCs and the regulation of stablecoins. The hearings will address important aspects of market structure legislation, with a focus on ensuring a comprehensive regulatory framework. This signifies a significant step towards addressing the challenges and opportunities presented by digital currencies in the current financial landscape.

news.headline: Dow Jones drops 750 points amid federal probe into UnitedHealth, while Nvidia faces potential impact from Warren Buffett report.
news.summary: Stocks in the Dow Jones plunged significantly today in response to news of a federal investigation into UnitedHealth. The stock market experienced a drop of 750 points, with Nvidia also falling to a critical level as anticipation builds for a report from Warren Buffett. Live coverage of these developments can be found on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Investment in Cygnus Finance by OKX Ventures boosts Web3 tech with real yield layers and creator economy solutions.
news.summary: OKX Ventures recently revealed its financial support of Cygnus Finance, a platform dedicated to improving Web3 by incorporating modular real yield layers and inventive creator economy solutions. This investment underscores OKX Ventures' commitment to fostering innovation in the cryptocurrency space.

Elon Musk's father, Errol, clarified comments on son's parenting on a podcast, stating they are on good terms.
news.summary: Errol Musk recently discussed his son's parenting skills on a podcast, where he expressed concerns about his abilities. However, Errol later clarified that his comments were misconstrued and that he maintains a good relationship with his son.

news.headline: US Energy Council Chief Burgum calls for every US power plant to expand capacity by 10-15% to meet AI needs.
Cupshe partners with Jessie James Decker & Kittenish for new collection Kissed By The Sun. Feb 21, 2025, LA - PRNewswire.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, it was announced that popular fashion e-commerce store Cupshe has launched a new collaborative collection called Cupshe x Jessie James Decker with Kittenish. This exclusive line, known as Kissed By The Sun, focuses on swimwear and apparel. The collection is designed to embody Cupshe's beach aesthetic and features items that cater to contemporary fashion trends.

news.headline: ITG, backed by TJC LP, acquires Cerisol to boost capacity and global service, emphasizing commitment to porcelain technology.
news.summary: Insulation Technology Group (ITG), a company under TJC LP's portfolio, has confirmed the purchase of Cerisol Isoladores Ceramicos SA (Cerisol) in a recent press release. This acquisition reflects ITG's focus on enhancing capacity to cater to global clientele. ITG remains steadfast in its dedication to leveraging porcelain technology and innovative solutions to meet the increasing demands of the electrical grid market. The emphasis on innovation, service, and quality consolidates ITG's position as a leader in advanced insulation solutions.

news.headline: Coinbase's increased political spending led to legal wins, potentially adding billions in value, including success with SEC charges.
news.summary: After increasing their political spending last year, the cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase has seen significant success. This includes allegedly reaching an agreement with the SEC to dismiss charges against them.

Energy Fuels Inc to hold earnings call on Feb 27, 2025 at 9:00 AM MT; leading U.S. producer of uranium, REE, critical minerals.
news.summary: A conference call and webcast will be held at 9:00 AM MT on Thursday, February 27, 2025 in Denver. Energy Fuels Inc., a prominent U.S. producer of uranium, rare earth elements, and critical minerals, is conducting the event. This will be an opportunity to hear from the company, known as UUUU on the NYSE American and EFR on the TSX. The call is set to provide important insights into their operations and future plans.

news.headline: Duke Energy Florida to build four solar sites, adding 300MW. Expected to save customers $843 million. Scheduled for completion by summer 2026.
news.summary: Duke Energy Florida has announced plans to establish new sites in Madison, Sumter, Hernando, and Jefferson counties, with a targeted completion date of summer 2026. These sites are projected to generate savings of $843 million for customers throughout their operational lifetimes. The announcement was made in St. Petersburg, Florida on February 21, 2025.

news.headline: Bitfinex's latest app update (v7.7.0) boosts user experience, with improved navigation and faster onboarding for El Salvador users.
news.summary: Bitfinex has launched the latest version 7.7.0 of its mobile application, offering significant enhancements and novel features to users. This update boasts improved performance and navigation, along with a quick onboarding process specially tailored for users in El Salvador. The release aims to provide a smoother and more efficient user experience.

news.headline: JPMorgan's Berro suggests staying calm amid inflation concerns; advises monitoring the situation closely.
Netradyne's Driver Drowsiness with DMS Sensor wins HDT 2025 Top 20 Product award for 2024, enhancing trucking safety.
news.summary: In San Diego, Netradyne, a top SaaS provider of AI and edge computing, revealed that Heavy Duty Trucking's editors recognized their Driver Drowsiness with DMS Sensor as one of the HDT 2025 Top 20 Products. The product, released in 2024, aims to enhance safety in the trucking sector. Known for its precision, Netradyne's system offers real-time alerts to drivers, aiding in the prevention of collisions.
